시편 63:1.content: God, you are my God. I will earnestly seek you. My soul thirsts for you. My flesh longs for you, in a dry and weary land, where there is no water.

시편 63:2.content: So I have seen you in the sanctuary, watching your power and your glory.

시편 63:3.content: Because your loving kindness is better than life, my lips shall praise you.

시편 63:4.content: So I will bless you while I live. I will lift up my hands in your name.

시편 63:5.content: My soul shall be satisfied as with the richest food. My mouth shall praise you with joyful lips,

시편 63:6.content: when I remember you on my bed, and think about you in the night watches.

시편 63:7.content: For you have been my help. I will rejoice in the shadow of your wings.

시편 63:8.content: My soul stays close to you. Your right hand holds me up.

시편 63:9.content: But those who seek my soul to destroy it shall go into the lower parts of the earth.

시편 63:10.content: They shall be given over to the power of the sword. They shall be jackal food.

시편 63:11.content: But the king shall rejoice in God. Everyone who swears by him will praise him, for the mouth of those who speak lies shall be silenced.
